raw_text: Lectures 1-2: summary Introduction: 1-79 We’ve covered a “ton” of material! ▪Internet overview ▪what’s a protocol? ▪network edge, access network, core • packet-switching versus circuit- switching • Internet structure ▪performance: loss, delay, throughput ▪layering, service models ▪security ▪history (optional) You now have: ▪context, overview, vocabulary, “feel” of networking ▪more depth, detail, and fun to follow!
